title: Gemini Omni Tutorial: How to Use Gemini Omni AI for Beginners
summary: Tutorial covering Google Omni Flash for AI video editing workflows. The content demonstrates real prompts, generation failures, iterative edits, character consistency tests, and comparisons with Sora. Key focus is whether Omni Flash represents a paradigm shift toward editable video generation versus traditional one-shot generation.
writeup: This tutorial from AI Master walks through Google Omni Flash for AI video editing workflows, showing real prompts, generation failures, iterative edits, and character consistency tests. The central question is whether Omni Flash marks a shift toward editable video generation rather than traditional one-shot generation, with direct comparisons against Sora. Concrete takeaways include how test-time editing handles revisions, where consistency holds or breaks across characters, and how the iterative approach contrasts with single-pass output.
